response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified "林檎売りの泡沫少女" in the first song segment and "蒼炎" (by 我乃) in the second song segment. 2. Performed web searches for lyrics and English translations for both songs. 3. Transcribed lyrics directly from the on-screen text for the song "蒼炎" as web search results for that specific song were limited. 4. Segmented the video into three parts based on the audio and visual changes (Song, Dialogue, Song).
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring the VTuber Shirakami Fubuki, consisting of two songs, "林檎売りの泡沫少女" (Apple Seller's Foam Girl) and "蒼炎" (Blue Flame), separated by a narrative dialogue segment.

scenes.description: VTuber Shirakami Fubuki performs the song "林檎売りの泡沫少女". Text indicating the song title is visible in the top left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
遠い遠い時の果て
そこに住まう人は皆
永遠の命をもつ世界での話
赤い実の成る木の下
(ララルーラ)
生まれながらに
死の呪いがかけられた少女の話
色付いた街外れ
蒼く光る湖畔
赤い実のお菓子屋
(ほら、ララルーラ)
時計塔の見える市
(驚いた？)
自信を売る
(そんなのひとつも売れないさ)
冷えていく、今日は妙に誇らしい
そんなの売れないよと
少女を見て蔑む人達
(あぁ、なんと哀れ)
売れないなら作ればいい
ないのなら作ればいい
生きられないのなら
消えてしまえばいい
それがあなたの幸せとしても
結末が悲劇だとしても
死んだ世界でただ二人だけが
幸せだった
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
This is a tale at the far ends of time
In a place where people have eternal life
This is a tale of a girl
(La la lu la)
Born under a tree bearing red fruit
Who was thus cursed with the fate of death
Colored city outskirt, blue glowing lake shore
Red fruit candy shop
(See? La la lu la)
The city where you can see the clock tower
(Surprised?)
Selling self-confidence
(That is just one)
It's getting cold, today is strangely proud to sell
"Nobody will buy such a thing," the girl said
Looking at the people who look down on her
(Ah, how pitiful)
If you can't sell it, then make it
If you don't have it, then create it
If you can't live, then
Just vanish
Even if the happiness is your own
Even if the ending is a tragedy
If it's just us two in this dying world
Then that would be happiness
(La la lu la)

scenes.description: A narrative dialogue segment featuring a character, setting up the context for the next song.
VTuber Shirakami Fubuki performs the song "蒼炎". Title and artist credits are shown on screen. Lyrics are transcribed from the video.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
誰かが言いました
激しく燃えるものほど
煌めく引き換えに
その身をすぐ焦がしきると
数ある燭台に
お好きな火を灯しましょう
期待と裏腹に
燻ればおぞましい憎さ
ランランランラン
右手には錆びた時計
左には油の筒
錆のドレスを着飾って　さあ
激しく　儚く
青く燃える花びら
瞬きゆらめく
生を彩り照らせ
いずれ尽き果てる未来へと
ゆりかごの目の前で
あまねく飛び交う銃弾
指だけ動かせば容易くその火は潰える
仮初の情熱で焼け爛れた舌では
上手に喋ることができないようで
喉元すぎても毒を孕ませて
やがては筋を腐らせる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Someone said
The more intensely something burns
The more it instantly burns its own body in exchange for glittering
Let's light your favorite fire in the many candlesticks
If expectations and betrayal simmer
They will fester into intense hatred
La la la la
On the right hand, a rusted clock
On the left, a cylinder of oil
Dress up in a dress of rust and come
Intensely, transiently
Blue glowing flower petals
Twinkling, flickering
Lighting up the color of life
Towards a future that will eventually exhaust itself
In front of the cradle
A barrage of bullets flying around
If you just move your finger, that fire can easily be extinguished
Even if it burns through with the raw heat of a fake, scorched tongue
As if you cannot speak well
Even if it's too late, let it fester with poison
Eventually, it will rot away
